title: Tunisian Wood Fired Apple Crisp
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert made with Tunisian ingredients, perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: Apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other sweet varieties

ingredients.name: Tunisian
ingredients.notes: Tunisian honey or orange blossom water

ingredients.name: Shattering
ingredients.notes: Granola or chopped nuts for topping

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples into a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the bake, fired, and Tunisian ingredients.
Pour the mixture over the apples and toss to coat.
Top with shattering for a crunchy topping.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the apples are tender and the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
